resources.string: No files yet. Tap + to create your first Markdown file
No history yet. Files will be recorded automatically
No pinned files of this type
No recent access of this type
Tap \"New File\" above to create your first document
Copy the file to Mdcito workspace
Open the file directly without importing
Theme mode, theme color, theme scheme
Warm dark brown background, calm and cozy
Cool dark gray background, modern and techy
Pure black background, maximum battery saving
Deep blue background, elegant and profound
Warm beige background, natural and cozy
Cool blue-gray background, fresh and calm
Yellowish paper background, easy on the eyes
Light green background, fresh and natural
Dynamic color is enabled, custom theme color and scheme will be ignored
Dynamic color requires Android 12 or later
Solid background, standard border, clean and sharp
Semi-transparent blur with directional light emboss texture
Apply blur effect to background image
Set the global app background image
Set the editor page background image
Apply blur effect to background image
Adjust font size, line height, and letter spacing for the editor
• Strict CommonMark spec compliance\n• No tables, strikethrough, or task lists\n• Maximum compatibility and predictability

• Tables and strikethrough
• Task lists and autolinks
• Heading anchors
• Most widely used dialect
JetBrains IDE parsing engine, GFM compatible

• JetBrains IDE parsing engine
• GFM compatible
• LaTeX math formula support
• Used in IntelliJ / Android Studio
Markdown Editor\nFocus on writing\nClean and elegant typography
Prompt to save when exiting the editor
Automatically create version snapshots on save (up to 50 per file)
Show line numbers on the left side of the editor
Highlight the line where the cursor is
Synchronize scrolling between editor and preview
Choose the highlight color for the current line
This is a preview of the highlighted line
Import Markdown files from external sources to history
HTTP is insecure, will be upgraded to HTTPS
%1$d file(s) have conflicts. Please choose which version to keep:
Switching service type will clear the current credentials. Are you sure you want to continue?
Clear preview cache and temporary files
Are you sure you want to clear all preview cache and temporary files?
Are you sure you want to delete all version snapshots? This action cannot be undone.
Restore to the initial default path
Are you sure you want to restore the workspace path to default? New files will be saved to the default location.
Upload images to image host in the editor when enabled
Are you sure you want to delete profile \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Copy the JSON data below to backup image host profiles
Use GitHub repository as image host storage
Generate at GitHub Settings → Developer settings → Personal access tokens
Get API Token from SM.MS website
Register an app on Imgur to get Client ID
JSONPath expression to extract image URL from response
Enable GPU-accelerated rendering for smoother Markdown preview; disable if you encounter display issues to use CPU software rendering
Debug mode, log level & log export
Delete file, version restore, sync conflict
Export app logs to a file
Restore all settings to default values
Delete all files and settings (dangerous action)
Are you sure you want to restore all settings to default values? This action cannot be undone.
This action will permanently delete all user data, including files, cache, snapshots, and personalization settings. This action cannot be undone!\n\nAre you sure you want to continue?
⚠️ Final confirmation: All data will be permanently deleted and cannot be recovered. The app will restart automatically.\n\nConfirm again to clear all data?
Settings have been restored to default values. Some settings may require an app restart to take effect
All data has been cleared. The app will restart
Submit feature suggestions or improvement ideas

Mdcito is built with the help of the following open source projects. This page lists all open source components used in this project along with their license information. Tap to visit the project repository.
The current file has unsaved changes. Save before exiting?
No version snapshots yet\nSnapshots are created automatically when saving
Are you sure you want to restore to the version from %s? Current content will be replaced.
Are you sure you want to delete this version snapshot? This action cannot be undone.
Name cannot start with a dot
A file with this name already exists
A clean and elegant Markdown editor\nWith live preview, syntax highlighting & tap-to-edit\nLet your writing flow without distraction
Three card styles: Minimal / Frosted / Liquid Glass\nWarm theme schemes, natural and cozy visual experience\nEvery detail carefully crafted
All data stored locally, privacy assured\nVersion snapshots, auto save, SAF file management\nYour words belong only to you
To manage files and folders on your device\n\"Manage all files\" permission is required\nYour data security is in your hands
Permission granted, files can be managed normally
Return to the app after authorization to continue
Authorization is required before you can start
Go to Settings → find Mdcito → enable \"Allow management of all files\"
Control the global UI text font
Font for the editing area in editor mode
Import font file from local storage
This setting only affects UI elements
Restart the app to apply the language change
No files yet\nTap + to create your first Markdown file
No folders yet\nTap + to create a folder to organize your files
Import a file from external storage to current folder
Import a folder from external storage to history
Import a folder from external storage to current folder
Are you sure you want to delete \"%s\"? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete %d selected items? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to delete all files and folders? This action cannot be undone.
No file history yet\nFile access will be recorded automatically
No folder history yet\nFolder access will be recorded automatically
Are you sure you want to delete the history record for \"%s\"?
Are you sure you want to delete %d selected history records? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to clear all history records? This action cannot be undone.
Delete %d selected snapshots? This action cannot be undone.
Delete all version snapshots? This action cannot be undone.
Please enter a value between %1$d and %2$d
Enabled, will save automatically at set intervals
No snapshots yet\nSave a file or create a snapshot manually
Are you sure you want to delete the version snapshot from %1$s? This action cannot be undone.
No active image host profile found
Cannot extract image URL from response: %s
API URL must start with http(s)
Repository name should be in owner/repo format
API URL must start with http(s)
Alibaba Cloud OSS configuration validated (placeholder implementation, OSS SDK integration required)
Tencent Cloud COS configuration validated (placeholder implementation, COS SDK integration required)
Google\'s Chinese font, suitable for body text
JetBrains programming font, suitable for code blocks
Open-source Chinese font with elegant Kai style
Sync files to cloud storage services such as WebDAV/FTP
Enable to sync files to the cloud
Sync to OneDrive or Google Drive via OAuth2
Choose how file sync is triggered
Only perform auto-sync when connected to Wi-Fi
Only perform auto-sync when the device is charging

One filter rule per line, supports wildcards, e.g.:
*.tmp
*.log
~$*
Supported wildcards: * (any character), ? (single character), **/ (any directory level)\nExamples: *.tmp, ~$*, **/node_modules
Choose how to handle file conflicts
FTP transmits data in plain text, including username and password, posing a security risk. Use FTPS or SFTP instead.
Debug mode is disabled. Enable debug mode to view log content.
Clear log records of all levels at once
Are you sure you want to clear all %s level logs? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to clear all log levels? This action cannot be undone.
Export format: plain text (.txt), filename includes export timestamp
Generate sample logs of each level for testing
HTTP-based file sync protocol, compatible with Nutstore, Nextcloud, etc.
Traditional file transfer protocol for legacy servers
FTP over TLS, encrypted transfer for security
SSH file transfer protocol, secure and reliable
Manually trigger sync, full user control
Auto sync at set intervals, no manual action needed
Auto keep the newer version by modification time
Always keep the local file version
Always keep the remote file version
Prompt user to choose when conflicts occur
Please fill in OAuth Client ID
Security verification failed: state parameter mismatch
Security verification failed: missing state parameter
Connection test failed: %s, please check configuration
Automatically check for new versions on startup
Prefer Gitee, fallback to GitHub on failure
You are using the latest version of Mdcito
Allow installation from unknown sources to install updates
Mdcito %s has been released, tap to view details
Check and download the latest version
Check if a new version is available now
No update available on this platform
